subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God and my Beloved! Thou beholdest my poverty and my destitution [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی و محبوبی تری فقری و افتقاری
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @thankfulness; gratitude, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
